prompts: Cinematic shot in a sunlit Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Toma Emberlane, a masculine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps, spreads a large parchment map across a rustic wooden table. He points to a marked location on the map with a cheerful expression. Toma Moonvale, a feminine ranger in a green half-cape, leans over the table to inspect the route. High quality, consistent lighting, no text, no watermark.

Continuous cinematic shot in the same Japanese fantasy guild hall. Toma Moonvale traces the route on the parchment map with her finger, nodding in agreement with Toma Emberlane. She looks up at him with a collaborative smile, and they both share a moment of professional understanding. The warm, detailed environment remains consistent. No text, no watermark.
